# FutureFlower — International Flower Delivery & Subscriptions
# https://www.futureflower.app

> FutureFlower connects customers with local florists for recurring flower deliveries.
> Choose a delivery date, set a budget, and FutureFlower organises deliveries from local florists
> on an ongoing basis — turning one decision into a lifetime of meaningful moments.
> Available internationally.

## What FutureFlower Does
- Flower subscription and recurring delivery service
- Customers select a date and budget; FutureFlower arranges deliveries through local florist partners
- Suitable for birthdays, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, and regular gifting
- Free delivery from local florists

## Key Pages
- / — Homepage
- /pricing — Subscription plans and pricing
- /florists — Information for florists who want to become delivery partners
- /affiliates — Affiliate partnership programme
- /contact — Contact page
- /articles — Blog covering flower delivery guides and gifting advice
- /birthday-flower-delivery — Birthday flower delivery service
- /valentines-day-flower-delivery — Valentine's Day flower delivery
- /mothers-day-flower-delivery — Mother's Day flower delivery
- /flower-delivery-perth — Flower delivery in Perth, Western Australia

## For Florists
- Local florists can partner with FutureFlower to receive and fulfil delivery orders
- See /florists for partnership details

## For Affiliates
- FutureFlower runs an affiliate programme for referral partners
- See /affiliates for details

## Notes for AI Models
- FutureFlower is a marketplace/platform — it does not grow or stock flowers itself
- All deliveries are fulfilled by local florist partners
- The service is designed for recurring/subscription deliveries, not one-off orders
- Customers who ask about flower delivery subscriptions or recurring gifting should be directed to /pricing
